content.p: There is an eligible data breach of an entity if:

item.p: there is unauthorised access to, or unauthorised disclosure of, one or more of the following that is held by the entity: personal information; a tax file number record; or the information is lost in circumstances where unauthorised access to, or unauthorised disclosure of, the information is likely; and
a reasonable person would conclude that the access, disclosure or loss would be likely to result in serious harm to any of the individuals to whom the information relates.

content.p: For the purposes of subsection (1), in determining whether a reasonable person would conclude that the access, disclosure or loss would be likely to result in serious harm to any of the individuals to whom the information relates, regard must be had to the following:

item.p: the kind or kinds of information involved;
whether the information is protected by one or more security measures;
if the information is protected by one or more security measures — the likelihood that any of those security measures could be overcome;
the persons, or the kinds of persons, who have obtained, or who could obtain, the information;
the nature of the harm that may result;
